description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white plaster, natural stone, and dark accent panels, creating a striking contrast. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is set on a sloped lot with landscaped greenery, a paved driveway, and a small front patio area. The main entryway is recessed, sheltered by an overhang, and flanked by columns and stonework. The overall structure is boxy and angular, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, white and stone exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a recessed entryway with a patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped lot, white walls, and a mix of stone and dark accent panels, with minimal window openings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, patio, columns, and a prominent stone facade with large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing additional windows, a secondary entrance, and landscaped greenery along the slope.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat roof, back patio area, and a more private facade with fewer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, stone columns, steps, and a small patio area.
